titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) لَا أَقْطَعُ فِي الدَّغَارَةِ الْمُعْلَنَةِ وَ هِيَ الْخَلْسَةُ وَ لَكِنْ أُعَزِّرُهُ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) لَا أَقْطَعُ فِي الدَّغَارَةِ الْمُعْلَنَةِ وَ هِيَ الْخَلْسَةُ وَ لَكِنْ أُعَزِّرُهُ .

segments: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, from Abu Baseer,

from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws), said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘Iasws do not cut regarding Al-Dagara (picking up somebody else’s belongings) openly and it is stealth, but Iasws reprimand him’.
en.hubeali.text: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, from Abu Baseer, from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws), said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘Iasws do not cut regarding Al-Dagara (picking up somebody else’s belongings) openly and it is stealth, but Iasws reprimand him’.

narratorChain.raw: أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا ( عليهما السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ اخْتَلَسَ ثَوْباً مِنَ السُّوقِ فَقَالُوا قَدْ سَرَقَ هَذَا الرَّجُلُ فَقَالَ إِنِّي لَا أَقْطَعُ فِي الدَّغَارَةِ الْمُعْلَنَةِ وَ لَكِنْ أَقْطَعُ يَدَ مَنْ يَأْخُذُ ثُمَّ يُخْفِي .
arabic.text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ اخْتَلَسَ ثَوْباً مِنَ السُّوقِ فَقَالُوا قَدْ سَرَقَ هَذَا الرَّجُلُ فَقَالَ إِنِّي لَا أَقْطَعُ فِي الدَّغَارَةِ الْمُعْلَنَةِ وَ لَكِنْ أَقْطَعُ يَدَ مَنْ يَأْخُذُ ثُمَّ يُخْفِي .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad altogether, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qasy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws judged regarding a man who pilferred clothes from the market. So they said, ‘This man has stolen’. So heasws said, ‘Iasws do not cut with regardsin the Al-Dagara (picking up somebody else’s belongings) openly, but Iasws cut a hand of the one who takes, then hides’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad altogether, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qasy, (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws judged regarding a man who pilferred clothes from the market. So they said, ‘This man has stolen’. So heasws said, ‘Iasws do not cut with regardsin the Al-Dagara (picking up somebody else’s belongings) openly, but Iasws cut a hand of the one who takes, then hides’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَ عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ جَمِيعاً عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: لَيْسَ عَلَى الَّذِي يَسْتَلِبُ قَطْعٌ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَى الَّذِي يَطُرُّ الدَّرَاهِمَ مِنْ ثَوْبِ الرَّجُلِ قَطْعٌ .
arabic.text: لَيْسَ عَلَى الَّذِي يَسْتَلِبُ قَطْعٌ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَى الَّذِي يَطُرُّ الدَّرَاهِمَ مِنْ ثَوْبِ الرَّجُلِ قَطْعٌ .

segments: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from a number of our companions, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdul Rahma Bin Abu Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no cutting upon the one who embezzles, and there is no cutting upon the one who displaces the Dirhams from a cloth of the man’.
en.hubeali.text:
Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from a number of our companions, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdul Rahma Bin Abu Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no cutting upon the one who embezzles, and there is no cutting upon the one who displaces the Dirhams from a cloth of the man’.

narratorChain.raw: حُمَيْدُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سَمَاعَةَ عَنْ عِدَّةٍ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: قَالَ مَنْ سَرَقَ خُلْسَةً اخْتَلَسَهَا لَمْ يُقْطَعْ وَ لَكِنْ يُضْرَبُ ضَرْباً شَدِيداً .
arabic.text: قَالَ مَنْ سَرَقَ خُلْسَةً اخْتَلَسَهَا لَمْ يُقْطَعْ وَ لَكِنْ يُضْرَبُ ضَرْباً شَدِيداً .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who steals with stealthy embezzlement, he would not be cut, but he would be whipped with an intense whipping’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who steals with stealthy embezzlement, he would not be cut, but he would be whipped with an intense whipping’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِطَرَّارٍ قَدْ طَرَّ دَرَاهِمَ مِنْ كُمِّ رَجُلٍ قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَعْلَى لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الدَّاخِلِ قَطَعْتُهُ .
arabic.text: أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِطَرَّارٍ قَدْ طَرَّ دَرَاهِمَ مِنْ كُمِّ رَجُلٍ قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَعْلَى لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الدَّاخِلِ قَطَعْتُهُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘They came with a pick-pocket who had picked some Dirhams from a man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has picked it from his outer shirt, I<sup>asws</sup> would not cut his (hand), but if he picked is from his inner shirt, I<sup>asws</sup> would cut his (hand)’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘They came with a pick-pocket who had picked some Dirhams from a man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has picked it from his outer shirt, I<sup>asws</sup> would not cut his (hand), but if he picked is from his inner shirt, I<sup>asws</sup> would cut his (hand)’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أَرْبَعَةٌ لَا قَطْعَ عَلَيْهِمْ الْمُخْتَلِسُ وَ الْغُلُولُ وَ مَنْ سَرَقَ مِنَ الْغَنِيمَةِ وَ سَرِقَةُ الْأَجِيرِ فَإِنَّهَا خِيَانَةٌ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أَرْبَعَةٌ لَا قَطْعَ عَلَيْهِمْ الْمُخْتَلِسُ وَ الْغُلُولُ وَ مَنْ سَرَقَ مِنَ الْغَنِيمَةِ وَ سَرِقَةُ الْأَجِيرِ فَإِنَّهَا خِيَانَةٌ .

segments: Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Four, there is no cutting upon them – the embezzler, and the unfaithful (of trust), and the one who steals from the war booty, and the employee thief, for these are treachery’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Four, there is no cutting upon them – the embezzler, and the unfaithful (of trust), and the one who steals from the war booty, and the employee thief, for these are treachery’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ أَنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أُتِيَ بِرَجُلٍ اخْتَلَسَ دُرَّةً مِنْ أُذُنِ جَارِيَةٍ قَالَ هَذِهِ الدَّغَارَةُ الْمُعْلَنَةُ فَضَرَبَهُ وَ حَبَسَهُ .
arabic.text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ أَنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أُتِيَ بِرَجُلٍ اخْتَلَسَ دُرَّةً مِنْ أُذُنِ جَارِيَةٍ قَالَ هَذِهِ الدَّغَارَةُ الْمُعْلَنَةُ فَضَرَبَهُ وَ حَبَسَهُ .

segments: And by this chain, that,

‘They came with a man to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> who had picked ear rings from the ears of a girl. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is open snatching’. So he<sup>asws</sup> whipped him and imprisoned him’.
en.hubeali.text:
And by this chain, that,

‘They came with a man to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> who had picked ear rings from the ears of a girl. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is open snatching’. So he<sup>asws</sup> whipped him and imprisoned him’.

titles.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
titles.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

segments: إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَعْلَى لَمْ نَقْطَعْهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَسْفَلِ قَطَعْنَاهُ .
arabic.text: إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَعْلَى لَمْ نَقْطَعْهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَسْفَلِ قَطَعْنَاهُ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Bin Shamoun, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman, from Misma’a Abu Sayyar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, they came to him<sup>asws</sup> with a pick-pocket who had picked some Dirhams from the sleeve of a man. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has picked it from his outer shirt, we<sup>asws</sup> will not cut him; and if he has stolen from his inner shirt, we<sup>asws</sup> would cut him’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Bin Shamoun, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman, from Misma’a Abu Sayyar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, they came to him<sup>asws</sup> with a pick-pocket who had picked some Dirhams from the sleeve of a man. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has picked it from his outer shirt, we<sup>asws</sup> will not cut him; and if he has stolen from his inner shirt, we<sup>asws</sup> would cut him’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ شَمُّونٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ مِسْمَعٍ أَبِي سَيَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أُتِيَ بِطَرَّارٍ قَدْ طَرَّ مِنْ رَجُلٍ مِنْ رُدْنِهِ دَرَاهِمَ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أُتِيَ بِطَرَّارٍ قَدْ طَرَّ مِنْ رَجُلٍ مِنْ رُدْنِهِ دَرَاهِمَ
